title: Motorsport Manager 2 announced for release in 2027
contents_preview: Dream of managing your own racing team? Motorsport Manager 2 was revealed today for release in 2027 from Playsport Games and publisher Miniclip. Read the full article here: https://www.gamingonlinux.com/2026/06/motorsport-manager-2-announced-for-release-in-2027/

title: Lights Out And Away We Go!
